name: product-launch
description: Turns a product demo recording into a polished, motion-designed product launch video. Probes and reviews the footage, tightens dead air, assembles the best moments, then adds a branded intro, synced feature captions, transitions, a logo bug, an outro CTA, and a final logo + name end-card, plus an original synthesized music bed and UI sound effects. Cross-platform engine (ffmpeg + Python: Pillow + numpy) that runs on macOS, Windows, and Linux, with an optional macOS-native Swift/AVFoundation fast path. Use when someone asks to create a launch / promo / teaser / "show-off" / Product Hunt / social video from a screen recording or product demo. ALWAYS ask the user for a demo recording (and any missing product details) the moment this skill is triggered if they were not already provided.
